change_request: Implement production homepage with 9 sections: hero, program overview, process steps, benefits two-column, Colorado service area, testimonials, lead capture form, FAQ preview, final CTA banner. Bilingual EN/ES. Add county field to contact form. Add form error state handling.
acceptance_criteria: Homepage at /en/ has all 9 sections in correct order
Homepage at /es/ mirrors /en/ structure with Spanish content
Hero section has headline badge title subtitle and two CTAs with stats strip
Program Overview section is informational with no guarantee language
Process section uses BenefitsGrid with 3 steps
Benefits section uses TwoColumnSection
Counties preview section links to /counties page
Testimonials section renders 3 placeholder testimonials
Lead capture form renders on homepage with county dropdown and showMessage=false
FAQ preview section has 4 items and links to /faq
Final CTA banner has primary and secondary CTA
ContactForm has county select with required validation
ContactForm shows error message on submission failure
globals.css and api route unchanged

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by implementing the homepage with the specified sections and bilingual support.

llm_analysis.notes: The form handles empty and missing inputs but lacks explicit null input handling.
No breaking changes to APIs or contracts are evident from the diff.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add tests for new form validation and error handling logic.

rollback.head: 8aa014e5d88843959ef86fd5fbf14f3cf40d53be

overall.summary: The implementation aligns well with the change request, adding the necessary sections and bilingual support. However, testing coverage should be improved.
key_concerns: Lack of test coverage for new features and error handling.
